title: gyha

body:
**Are you tired of lag in Minecraft but still want the full OptiFine experience? Meet OptiFPS — an optimization-focused modpack designed to give you the best performance, smooth FPS, and visual enhancements without relying on OptiFine. Built around the Sodium rendering engine, this modpack combines the power of cutting-edge performance mods with the quality-of-life features you love.**

# 🌿 Key Features of OptiFPS
**✅ OptiFine-Like Features, Sodium-Powered ✅ High FPS Boost for low-end and high-end PCs ✅ Performance Tweaks with mods like Lithium, FerriteCore, and Starlight ✅ Visual Enhancements like shader support (Iris), custom sky, better grass, and dynamic lighting ✅ No Telemetry for maximum privacy ✅ Seamless Gameplay with no unnecessary bloat**

# 🚀 Core Mods in OptiFPS
**_Here’s a breakdown of the key mods included in the pack (as seen in the images):_**

**🔧 Category	🧩 Mods Included
🏎️ Performance	Sodium, Lithium, FerriteCore, Starlight, Dynamic FPS, C2ME, Lazy Language Loader
🎨 Visuals	Iris Shaders, Continuity, Entity Texture Features, Entity Culling, Puzzle, Capes, Optigui, ModelFix
🌲 World Optimization	Clumps, BetterGrassify, MoreCulling, ImmediatelyFast, Krypton, CleanF3, Fabric API, Cloth Config
🛡️ Utility	No Telemetry, Zoomify, ModMenu, MidnightLib, Krypton, Placeholder API, YetAnotherConfigLib
⚙️ Libraries	Fabric Language Kotlin, Fabric API, Fabric Loader, Modrinth API
These mods work together to deliver a smooth, stutter-free experience, while also allowing for beautiful visuals like custom skies, dynamic lighting, and shaders.**

# 💻 Why Choose OptiFPS?
**No OptiFine Needed: Get all the features you love (zoom, dynamic lights, connected textures, etc.) in a fully compatible Fabric ecosystem.
Better FPS on All Systems: Optimized for both low-end and high-end machines.
Privacy-Focused: No telemetry or data collection—just pure Minecraft.
Modular & Flexible: Add your favorite Fabric mods or tweak settings to your liking.
Easy to Use: Just install Fabric Loader, add the OptiFPS mods to your mods folder, and enjoy!
mrpack to zip**

# 🌟 Final Thoughts
**OptiFPS brings you the best of both worlds: the smooth performance of Sodium and the visual magic of OptiFine, without the drawbacks. Whether you're building, exploring, or fighting mobs, this modpack ensures you get the best FPS and a gorgeous experience every time you play Minecraft.**
